sections.paragraph:
Original: משׂגּב

Transliteration: miśgâb

Phonetic: mis-gawb'

BDB Definition:

Misgab = "height"
  1. high place, refuge, secure height, retreat (noun masculine)
    1. stronghold
    2. refuge (of God)
  2. a place in Moab (noun proper locative)

Origin: from H7682

TWOT entry: 2234a

Part(s) of speech:
